name: My workers comp claim in Ogden got denied—what now?
description: Appeal via Claims Resolution Conference in Utah.[1]

mainEntity.name: My workers comp claim in Ogden got denied—what now?

acceptedAnswer.text: Appeal via Claims Resolution Conference in Utah.[1]
acceptedAnswer.description: **Request a Claims Resolution Conference or file for a hearing with Utah's Industrial Accidents Division.** This resolves disputes without full litigation.[1] Key factors: Common denial reasons include late reporting or pre-existing conditions; gather medical evidence. Appeal within deadlines, avoid insurer traps. A specialist can navigate this effectively.
